label: Ceasefires Currently in Force
contestNote: Lebanon ceasefire under acute strain Apr 26: Israel issued forced evacuation orders for 7 south Lebanon towns + continued airstrikes despite 3-week extension; Hezbollah declared extension 'meaningless.' US-Iran nuclear talks collapsed Apr 26: Trump cancelled Witkoff/Kushner Pakistan trip, Araghchi pressed on with regional tour, indefinite ceasefire holds but diplomacy stalled (20-yr vs 5-yr enrichment gap unchanged). Gaza Phase II contested: Hamas rejected US disarmament clause Apr 14, IDF reported 14 Hamas breaches Apr 8-16, UNSC SC/16284 called for consolidation Apr 27. Sudan, DRC-Rwanda (Rwanda non-compliant per US), Yemen framework all contested
deltaNote: vs Jan 2026 — Lebanon escalation (evacuation orders Apr 26), Iran talks collapse (Round 2 cancelled Apr 26), Gaza Phase II strained; only 10 frameworks nominally in force with 3+ under acute violation

label: Processes Collapsed Since 2020
contestNote: US-Iran Islamabad Round 2 collapsed Apr 26 before it began (Trump cancelled Witkoff/Kushner trip); adds to: Afghanistan (Doha), Sudan Jeddah track, Myanmar (ASEAN 5-pt Consensus), Ethiopia-Tigray (partial implementation), Colombia ELN (since Jan 2025 Catatumbo), Libya LPDF (elections still blocked), Gaza Phase II (Hamas disarmament rejected), Yemen (ongoing violations), DRC-Rwanda (non-compliance)
deltaNote: US-Iran Round 2 cancelled Apr 26; Myanmar 100-day offer rejected Apr 21 — both add to tally of processes collapsed or effectively suspended
